name: catalyst
description: Research-driven development workflow with Linear integration, PM tools, and infrastructure research agents

plugins.name: catalyst-dev
plugins.description: Core development workflow: research → plan → implement → validate → ship. Includes 9 research agents, workflow commands, Linear integration, handoff system. Always enabled. ~3.5k context (lightweight MCPs: DeepWiki, Context7).

plugins.name: catalyst-pm
plugins.description: Linear-focused project management: cycle tracking, milestone planning, backlog grooming, daily standups, GitHub-Linear sync. Enable when managing Linear projects. ~5k context when enabled.

plugins.name: catalyst-analytics
plugins.description: Product analytics with PostHog MCP integration. Enable when analyzing user behavior, conversion funnels, and product metrics. ~40k context when enabled.

plugins.name: catalyst-debugging
plugins.description: Production error monitoring with Sentry MCP integration. Enable when debugging errors, analyzing stack traces, and investigating incidents. ~20k context when enabled.

plugins.name: catalyst-meta
plugins.description: Workflow discovery and creation: learn from community patterns and extend Catalyst. Optional plugin for advanced users.

plugins.name: catalyst-pm-ops
plugins.description: Linear cycle/backlog/PR ops, daily and weekly cadence, status updates, and team comms

plugins.name: catalyst-meeting-hygiene
plugins.description: Meeting workflow skills: agenda creation, transcript processing, end-of-day batch cleanup, and effectiveness retros

plugins.name: catalyst-discovery
plugins.description: User research, metrics, experimentation, and prototyping skills — upstream discovery work for product teams. Enable when running user research, defining metrics, or building prototypes.
